featureName: Security Hardening — Docker Binding, Auth Enforcement, Crypto Hygiene

scopeProgress.name: Docker Port Binding + NATS Config File
ML Sidecar Auth + Web UI Auth + OAuth Rate Limiting

executionHistory.summary: Created spec.md with problem statement, threat model for 6 attack surfaces, 7 actors/personas, 7 requirements with 23 Gherkin scenarios, outcome contract, non-functional requirements, success metrics, and 3 deferred improvement proposals. All findings SEC-001 through SEC-021 addressed.

Created design.md covering all 7 requirements (R-001 through R-007): Docker 127.0.0.1 port binding for 5 services, ML sidecar FastAPI auth dependency with hmac.compare_digest, webAuthMiddleware insertion in router.go Web UI group, httprate OAuth rate limiter (10 req/min/IP), NATS config file generation replacing --auth CLI arg, decrypt() fail-closed logic removing 3 plaintext fallback paths, startup auth warnings for core and ML sidecar.

Created scopes.md with 3 scopes: (1) Docker port binding + NATS config file, (2) ML sidecar auth + Web UI auth + OAuth rate limiting, (3) Decrypt fail-closed + startup auth warning. Created report.md and uservalidation.md templates.

Implemented all 3 scopes: Docker 127.0.0.1 binding for 6 services, NATS config file mount, ml/app/auth.py with hmac.compare_digest, webAuthMiddleware applied to Web UI group, httprate.LimitByIP(10, 1min) on OAuth start, decrypt() fail-closed on 3 paths when encKey present, startup WARN in cmd/core/main.go and ml/app/main.py. 51 unit tests pass.

Hardening sweep (SEC-SWEEP-001/002): added rate limiting to OAuth callback endpoint (defense in depth alongside CSRF state validation); added cap_drop:[ALL] to smackerel-core, smackerel-ml, nats containers (CIS Docker benchmark). 53 tests pass.

Certified spec 020-security-hardening. All 6 artifacts present. 3 scopes Done with 32/32 DoD items checked. Code-verified reconciliation evidence for all 3 scopes plus 2 security sweeps. Uservalidation has all 26 acceptance items checked. Unit tests: Go 33 packages + Python 75 tests pass.

Audit sweep (Reconcile-to-Doc + Regression Probe): full claimed-vs-implemented reconciliation across all 3 scopes, line-by-line verification of every DoD claim, cross-spec conflict analysis. Two doc-only drifts corrected (report.md stale OAuth callback rate-limit table entry, design.md stale snippet — both related to SEC-SWEEP-001). Zero functional drift; all 32 DoD items verified.

Chaos / gaps probe (GAP-020-R30-001/002/003): NATS config token escaping for special chars (CWE-74), ML sidecar TypeError handling for non-ASCII bearer (CWE-755), DoD integrity correction for OAuth callback rate-limit. Adversarial regression tests added in internal/config/docker_security_test.go and ml/tests/test_auth.py. 75 tests pass.

Docs pass: README.md CSP documentation updated to match pinned unpkg HTMX version path (SEC-R68-001). docs/Operations.md and docs/Deployment.md verified consistent with 127.0.0.1 binding and NATS config file mount.

Manual cross-check verifying implementation files exist and tests pass. ls internal/auth/ shows handler.go, oauth.go, oauth_test.go, store.go. wc -l: store.go 196, ml/app/auth.py 48, internal/api/router.go 309, cmd/core/main.go 290, ml/app/main.py 104, docker-compose.yml 186, scripts/commands/config.sh 824 (1957 total). find internal/auth internal/api -name '*.go' = 42 files. grep TODO/FIXME/HACK/STUB across spec-020 paths: 0 findings. Go tests: ok internal/auth (15.156s), ok internal/api (7.166s), ok cmd/core (0.485s), ok internal/config (0.057s). All implementation present and trustworthy.

cross_spec_trace_guard_remediation_via_per_class_fixes (Iter 9): Replaced aspirational test paths in Scope 1 Test Plan with concrete artifacts (scripts/commands/config.sh, docker-compose.yml, config/generated/dev.env, config/generated/nats.conf); tagged DoD bullets for SCN-020-001/002/006/013/014; appended trace-guard remediation section to report.md mentioning cmd/core/main_test.go. trace-guard PASSED (0 warnings).

Stochastic-quality-sweep sweep-2026-05-23-r30 round 15, parent-expanded child workflow mode security-to-doc. Security probe surfaced F-SEC-R30-001 (HIGH, CWE-290 / CWE-345): OAuth start/callback per-IP rate limit (R-004) bypassable via X-Forwarded-For / X-Real-IP / True-Client-IP because chi.middleware.RealIP was applied unconditionally at router root and httprate.LimitByIP keyed on the rewritten r.RemoteAddr. Same root cause weakened spec 044 /v1/web/login brute-force protection and polluted slog remote_addr audit fields. Spawned specs/020-security-hardening/bugs/BUG-020-005-oauth-rate-limit-bypass-via-forwarded-headers/ with full 6-artifact set. Fixed via SST-gated trusted-proxy middleware: added runtime.trusted_proxies to config/smackerel.yaml (empty SST default → secure-by-default), JSON-array→CSV bridge in scripts/commands/config.sh, RuntimeTrustedProxies in internal/config/config.go, TrustedProxies in api.Dependencies (internal/api/health.go), wired in cmd/core/wiring.go, new internal/api/realip.go implementing CIDR-allowlist-gated middleware (empty-allowlist identity short-circuit, one-time net.ParseCIDR at construction with slog.Error+drop on malformed entries, per-request peer check, header order True-Client-IP → X-Real-IP → XFF leftmost), and one-line router.go swap r.Use(deps.trustedProxyRealIPMiddleware()). Added 6 adversarial regression tests in internal/api/router_test.go covering the three SCN-SEC-FIX-005-NNN scenarios; adversarial-fidelity proof recorded — reverting router.go line 24 to r.Use(middleware.RealIP) makes 2 router tests FAIL with concrete bypass diagnostics, restoring returns all 6 to PASS. go vet clean, gofmt clean, internal/api and internal/config packages green.

notes: Security hardening — Docker 127.0.0.1 binding, ML+Web auth enforcement, OAuth rate limiting, NATS config file, decrypt fail-closed, startup warnings. 23 Gherkin scenarios, 32 DoD items, 75+ unit tests.
